claim: After the serving surface lives behind intelligence_serving, hooks.py should depend on that namespace directly instead of the legacy top-level serving aliases.
mechanism: hooks.py is itself part of the serving surface. Repointing its internal imports to namespace-local serving modules reduces wrapper reach-through and makes the top-level aliases more strictly a compatibility layer for external callers.
boundary: This tranche does not move hooks.py itself. It only changes internal import direction and preserves existing hook behavior.
